notes: Wrote brace-depth-tracking Dart/Flutter SDK extractor. Stats: 1252 files (0 part-of), 1172 types, 3 mixins, 3479 members total, 86 global funcs (not inflated), 2 typedefs. global_funcs count is 86 — well within the <100 sanity check. Sample Amity types: AmityPermission (enum, 30 members: BAN_USER/EDIT_USER/CREATE_ROLE/...), AmityRegionalHttpEndpoint (class, 3 members: endpoint/constructor/custom), AmityChannelMembershipFilter (enum, 3 members: ALL/MUTED/BANNED), AmityError (class, 34 members). Top 10 types by member count: AmityHiveType(43), AmityError(34), DbAdapterRepo(34), ChannelRepo(34), PostResponse(31), AmityPermission(30), CommentResponse(30), ChannelResponse(28), StoryResponse(26), CommunityResponse(25). Note: internal types (DbAdapterRepo, ChannelRepo, *Response) are captured since Dart has no explicit public modifier (only underscore-prefix for private). Extensions: aggregated into host type members with from_extension=true flag. Unhandled patterns flagged: none critical in v1 scope. Known v1 limitations: enum values detection may miss some enums with complex body syntax; constructor detection uses regex matching current_type_name which works for standard patterns but may miss constructors in nested classes or those with complex param syntax.
